programs.name: Y Combinator
programs.prerequisites: Early-stage startup, technical co-founder preferred, scalable idea. Summer 2026 batch open.

programs.name: Techstars
programs.prerequisites: Strong team, product-market fit potential, scalable technology. Fall 2026 programs open.

programs.name: Google for Startups Accelerator
programs.prerequisites: Seed-Series A, scalable AI/cloud products, equity-free program.

programs.name: NVIDIA Inception
programs.prerequisites: AI startup, free membership, no equity required. 17,000+ startups enrolled.

programs.name: Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
programs.prerequisites: Early-stage startup, up to $150K Azure credits, AI tools access.

programs.name: AWS Activate
programs.prerequisites: Startup building on AWS, up to $100K credits, third-party model access.

programs.name: Alchemist Accelerator
programs.prerequisites: Enterprise-focused (B2B), technical founders. Class starting January 2026.

programs.name: 500 Global Accelerator
programs.prerequisites: Post-revenue or strong traction, diverse teams, global focus.

programs.name: MassChallenge Switzerland
programs.prerequisites: Early-stage, impactful startups, equity-free. 2026 program open.

programs.name: Plug and Play Silicon Valley
programs.prerequisites: Industry-specific focus, 113 startups in first 2026 batch.

programs.name: Antler Founder Residency
programs.prerequisites: Individuals or teams, pre-idea or early stage. Dubai, Nairobi, Munich residencies open.

programs.name: Entrepreneur First
programs.prerequisites: Talented individuals, pre-team, pre-idea, technical background. London & SF programs.

programs.name: a16z Speedrun
programs.prerequisites: Early-stage teams, up to $1M investment, 12-week program.
